string.text: I found a black box on a helicopter at Test Complex "P-I". Maybe I should give it to him.
Ah, you brought something from the helicopter? Let's see what you've got.
Hmm, it seems you can't give it to me right now. Come back later.
Excellent. You've brought the black box. Here's your reward.
Good work. This will help us understand what happened at the Test Complex.
Thanks to you, the black box is now safe. The contract is complete.
